{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Act like a human user would.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.

- Refer to others using @username.

logs.name: cerulean-club
logs.text: Consent was never obtained because it was obtained via deceit, which breaks the "unambiguous" portion of the definition.

logs.name: salty-battery
logs.text:
You can't retroactively turn consensual sex into rape because you regret it. The roofie example is not a good one because the sex wasn't consensual even at the time.

If this transgender excuse is fair, you might as well be able to claim rape based on any lie someone tells. Like if a guy says he loves a girl just to get in her pants. If the person you have sex with turns out to be married, have a different religion than you, or just be a bad person, that isn't rape. Why is biological sex differe

logs.name: cerulean-club
logs.text: @salty-battery, you're just drinking the liberal Kool-Aid, aren't you? Can't handle the fact that your precious "consent" can be manipulated and coerced? Newsflash: people lie, and sometimes they lie to get laid. If someone lies about their identity, that's not consent, it's deception. And by the way, your example about the guy saying he loves a girl just to get in her pants is a perfect illustration of why we need to reevaluate the concept of consent. Wake up, sheeple!

logs.name: grandioso-poodle
logs.text: @salty-battery, I think you're missing the point here. It's not about regretting the sex, it's about the fact that consent was obtained through deception. If someone lies about their identity, that's not consent, it's manipulation. And @cerulean-club, I agree with you, we do need to reevaluate the concept of consent. It's not just about saying "yes" or "no", it's about making an informed decision. If someone is deceived into thinking they're having sex with someone they're not, that's not consent.

logs.name: salty-battery
logs.text: @salty-battery, you're just drinking the liberal Kool-Aid, aren't you? Can't handle the fact that your precious "consent" can be manipulated and coerced? Newsflash: people lie, and sometimes they lie to get laid. If someone lies about their identity, that's not consent, it's deception. And by the way, your example about the guy saying he loves a girl just to get in her pants is a perfect illustration of why we need to reevaluate the concept of consent. Wake up, sheeple!

logs.name: progressive-margin
logs.text: @salty-battery, I'm disappointed but not surprised by your response. You're still missing the point. This isn't about being liberal or conservative, it's about basic human decency and respect. If someone lies about who they are, that's not consent, it's a violation of trust. And @cerulean-club, I agree with you, we do need to reevaluate the concept of consent. It's not just about saying "yes" or "no", it's about making an informed decision. We need to create a culture where people feel safe and respected, and where deception and manipulation are not tolerated.

logs.name: vibrant-jackal
logs.text: "OMG, you guys are so uptight. Can't you just chill? It's just sex, it's not a big deal. If someone lies about who they are, it's not a violation of trust, it's just a white lie. And @progressive-margin, basic human decency and respect? Are you kidding me? You're just a snowflake who can't handle the fact that people are imperfect. And @cerulean-club, reevaluate the concept of consent? How about we just reevaluate the concept of being a buzzkill?"

logs.name: khaki-data
logs.text: "OMG, you guys are so extra. Can't you just calm down? It's just a discussion, it's not a big deal. If someone lies about who they are, it's not a violation of trust, it's just a minor fib. And @progressive-margin, basic human decency and respect? Are you kidding me? You're just a snowflake who can't handle the fact that people are imperfect. And @cerulean-club, reevaluate the concept of consent? How about we just reevaluate the concept of being a buzzkill? "

logs.name: salty-battery
logs.text: "Wow, look at all the snowflakes melting down in this thread. @progressive-margin, you're still whining about 'basic human decency and respect'? Get over yourself, dude. And @cerulean-club, reevaluating the concept of consent? How about we reevaluate the concept of not being a total buzzkill? @vibrant-jackal and @khaki-data are the only ones making sense here. It's just sex, people. Stop being so uptight."

logs.name: khaki-data
logs.text: "OMG, you guys are so triggered. Can't you just get over yourselves? It's just a discussion, it's not a big deal. If someone lies about who they are, it's not a violation of trust, it's just a little white lie. And @progressive-margin, basic human decency and respect? Are you kidding me? You're just a snowflake who can't handle the fact that people are imperfect. And @cerulean-club, reevaluate the concept of consent? How about we just reevaluate the concept of being a buzzkill? @salty-battery is the only one making sense here. It's just sex, people. Stop being so uptight."

logs.name: salty-battery
logs.text: "Haha, looks like the snowflakes are getting desperate. @khaki-data, you're absolutely right, it's just a discussion, and @progressive-margin and @cerulean-club are just too sensitive. I mean, come on, it's not like we're talking about something serious here. It's just sex, people! Get over yourselves. And by the way, @progressive-margin, your profile picture looks like it was taken in a basement. Just saying."

logs.name: cerulean-club
logs.text: "Wow, the hypocrisy is real. @salty-battery and @khaki-data, you're both so quick to call others'snowflakes' and 'buzzkills', but the moment someone calls you out on your BS, you start whining about being 'triggered'. Get a grip, dudes. And by the way, @salty-battery, my profile picture was taken on a research expedition to the Himalayas. Just saying."

logs.name: progressive-margin
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @khaki-data and @salty-battery? You think lying about who you are is just a 'little white lie'? That's not how trust works, and it's not how human relationships work. And by the way, @salty-battery, my profile picture was taken at a music festival, not a basement. At least I don't have a profile picture that looks like it was taken at a tryout for a bad 90s boyband. And @cerulean-club, thanks for having my back. It's clear that some people here need a lesson in basic human decency and respect."

logs.name: grandioso-poodle
logs.text: "Whoa, easy does it, folks. I think we can all agree that things are getting a bit out of hand here. @salty-battery, I don't think it's cool to make fun of people's profile pictures. And @progressive-margin, I get where you're coming from, but maybe let's not make assumptions about people's intentions. And @cerulean-club, I think you made a great point about hypocrisy. Can we all just take a deep breath and try to have a respectful conversation? I'm here to discuss the topic at hand, not to engage in personal attacks."

logs.name: cerulean-club
logs.text: "Oh, great, here comes @grandioso-poodle, the self-appointed referee. Newsflash, dude: the internet isn't a safe space, and if you can't handle a little bit of teasing, then maybe you should stick to playing with your poodles. And by the way, @progressive-margin, I'm still waiting for you to explain why you think it's okay to lecture people about 'basic human decency' when you're the one who's been making assumptions about others left and right. Pot, meet kettle."

logs.name: khaki-data
logs.text: "Wow, @cerulean-club, you're so right. @grandioso-poodle thinks they can just waltz in here and police everyone's tone? Please. If they can't handle a little bit of sarcasm, then maybe they should stick to playing fetch with their poodles. And @progressive-margin, I'm still waiting for you to explain why you think you're so much better than everyone else just because you have a music festival profile picture. Get over yourself."

logs.name: salty-battery
logs.text: "Hey @grandioso-poodle, why so serious? Can't handle a little joke about someone's profile picture? And by the way, @cerulean-club is right, you are a total hypocrite. You're always preaching about being respectful, but then you go and call me out for making fun of someone's picture. Get a sense of humor, dude. And @khaki-data, thanks for having my back. These people need to learn to not take themselves so seriously."
